## Summary
- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Checklist
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/*`)
- [ ] No Clean-Architecture boundary violations
- [ ] Multi-monitor and ambient-presence behavior considered (if client changes)
- [ ] Realtime + REST fallback impact considered (if API/SignalR changes)

## Acceptance Impact
- [ ] Affects customer acceptance criteria
- [ ] Affects operations/deployment
- [ ] Affects security/roles
